steps.title: Set off the example phrase
steps.content: The phrase for instance interrupts the sentence between an opening prepositional phrase and the main clause. It needs matching commas around it.

steps.title: Keep the sentence intact
steps.content: A creates a fragment by ending after the opening phrase. C uses a colon where a paired comma is needed, and D uses a semicolon even though the words before it are not an independent clause. The comma after newts pairs with the comma after instance. The answer is B.
